zh.Péguilhan, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Fra: 法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛培吉利韓
zh.Lanta, Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, France: 法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛藍塔
zh.Foix, Midi-Pyrénées, France: 法國奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cécile de Foix於1200年出生在法國奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦時，她的父親Raimond-Roger de Foix48歲，母親Felipa de Montcada29歲。她於1224年5月6日與Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1270年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cécile de Foix于1200年出生在法国奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦时，她的父亲Raimond-Roger de Foix48岁，母亲Felipa de Montcada29岁。她于1224年5月6日与Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1270年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss French: unexplained. In Switzerland it is found mainly in the Valais Canton.
Catalan: nickname from moix with various possible meanings, including ‘cat’, ‘drunk’, and ‘lame’.

nameMeanings.name: Cécile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Cecily  , now also quite common in the English-speaking world (usually without the accent). The form   Cecile   is found in 14th‐century English records.

en.lifeSummary: When Cécile de Foix was born in 1200, in Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France, her father, Raimond-Roger de Foix, was 48 and her mother, Felipa de Montcada, was 29. She married Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges on 6 May 1224. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1270, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cécile de Foix est née en 1200, à Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France, son père, Raimond-Roger de Foix, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Felipa de Montcada, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges le 6 mai 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1270, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cécile de Foix 1200 in Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raimond-Roger de Foix 48 und ihre Mutter Felipa de Montcada 29. Sie hat am 6. Mai 1224 Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1270 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cécile de Foix è nata il nel 1200 nel Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, sua padre, Raimond-Roger de Foix, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Felipa de Montcada, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges il 6 maggio 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1270, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cécile de Foixが1200年にフランスオクシタニーアリeッジフォイックスで生まれた時，父Raimond-Roger de Foixは48歳，母Felipa de Montcadaは29歳であった。1224年5月6日にBernard V de Comminges Comte de Commingesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1270年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cécile de Foix(이)가 1200년 프랑스 옥시탠이 애리e지 포이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raimond-Roger de Foix(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Felipa de Montcada(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1224년 5월 6일 Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cécile de Foix nasceu em 1200, em Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Raimond-Roger de Foix, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Felipa de Montcada, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges em 6 de maio de 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1270, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cécile de Foix родилась в 1200 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, окситани, Франция, её отцу по имени Raimond-Roger de Foix было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Felipa de Montcada, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges 6 мая 1224 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1270 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cécile de Foix nació en 1200, en Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Raimond-Roger de Foix, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Felipa de Montcada, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges el 6 de mayo de 1224. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1270, a la edad de 70 años.
